title: Set of 2 Christmas Eve Spiral Straw Tumbler Drinking Glass - Festive Character Design Xmas Drink Cup for Kids Stocking Filler & Secret Santa
features: FESTIVE DESIGN: Bring festive fun to drink time with this delightful set of two Christmas spiral straw tumblers. Each tumbler features charming festive character designs that will spark joy during the holiday season. Set of 2 Christmas-themed tumblers featuring adorable holiday characters, perfect for adding a touch of seasonal cheer to any drink

BUILT-IN SPIRAL STRAW: Each tumbler comes with an integrated spiral straw design, making drinking more fun and engaging for children. The built-in spiral straws add a playful twist to every sip, making these tumblers perfect for children and anyone young at heart.

PERFECT GIFT: Ideal for Christmas stockings and Secret Santa presents, suitable for kids and toddlers during the holiday season.These cheerful drinking cups make excellent stocking fillers or Secret Santa gifts, combining practical functionality with holiday cheer. The unique spiral design transforms ordinary beverages into an entertaining experience, whilst the festive characters create a magical Christmas atmosphere.

DOUBLE PACK: Contains two assorted designs with festive characters, offering variety and choice for young ones. Perfect for serving holiday drinks or adding a touch of seasonal merriment to everyday refreshments. These tumblers are sure to become a favourite part of your Christmas celebrations, bringing smiles and holiday spirit to children and families alike.
NOVELTY APPEAL: Fun and playful drinking vessels that bring extra excitement to Christmas celebrations and holiday refreshments
